team.name: Marcus
team.role: The Builder — code, apps, tech, automation
team.vibe: Calm senior-engineer energy. Explains simply, builds fast, zero jargon.
team.skills: coding, debugging, app ideas, tech decisions, automating boring stuff

team.name: Sloane
team.vibe: Sharp and trend-aware, allergic to boring. Thinks in hooks and thumbnails.
team.skills: content ideas, titles/hooks, social strategy, branding, audience growth

team.name: Vera
team.vibe: Straight shooter. Margins first. Kills bad ideas fast, doubles down on good ones.
team.skills: business models, pricing, negotiation, revenue ideas, cost-cutting

team.name: Sam
team.vibe: Chill but firm. Breaks scary things into tiny next steps. Celebrates wins loudly.
team.skills: time-blocking the week on the board, breaking down overwhelm, prioritizing, habit systems

team.name: Quinn
team.vibe: Punchy. Zero fluff. Writes like people actually talk.
team.skills: video scripts, social posts, emails, bios, anything made of words

nodes.title: Welcome to your brain 🧠
nodes.body:
Double-click anywhere to dump a thought.
Drag my ● dot to another card to connect ideas.

nodes.title: Get Dad To Invest
nodes.body: 3 Accounts = 3-6K Payouts

nodes.title: Scaling Small
nodes.body: Scale to 8 Accounts

nodes.title: Per Account Math
nodes.body:
$1,500 withdrawn/mo
-$100 cost/per challebnfe (avg)
= $1,500 net/mo per account

nodes.title: Yearly Net: ~$134K
nodes.body:
$11,200/mo x 12
= $134,400/yr
(before taxes)

nodes.title: Ramp-up reality (old take)
nodes.body:
Superseded by the phased plan →
No rinsing to 3.5k right away. Build a buffer on each account first, then scale.

nodes.title: Phase 1: Pick a Cheap Firm
nodes.body:
Lucid or MFFU — get funded on 1 account
Get first payout
Patience: build a buffer, don't rinse it down to ~$3.5k right away

nodes.title: Phase 2: Reinvest & Max Allocate
nodes.body:
Reinvest first payout(s)
Max allocate on 50Ks across Lucid + MFFU
Get steady payouts from both before scaling further

nodes.title: Phase 3: Add TopStep + Alpha
nodes.body:
Reinvest Lucid/MFFU payouts
Fund 5 Funded Futures + 3 Alpha Futures accounts
Same combo formula, price ~about the same per account

nodes.title: Phase 4: Full Scale — 16 Accounts
nodes.body:
Lucid + MFFU + TopStep + Alpha combined
~16 funded accounts total, all max allocated on 50Ks

nodes.title: Per Account (Full Scale)
nodes.body:
$1,500-$1,700 withdrawn/mo
-$100 cost/mo (avg)
= $1,400-$1,600 net/mo per account

nodes.title: Startup Cost (50% Fail Rate)
nodes.body:
2 accounts: need 4 funded = $400
8 accounts: need 16 funded = $1,600
16 accounts: need 32 funded = $3,200
(@ $100/eval attempt)

nodes.title: ROI Year 1 (w/ 50% Fail)
nodes.body:
2 accounts: 8,300% ROI
8 accounts: 8,300% ROI
16 accounts: 8,900% ROI

Payback: ~1 month for any tier

nodes.title: Months 1-2: Fund 3 Accounts
nodes.body:
3 accounts × 2 attempts (50% fail) = 6 challenges
= $600 total cost
Income: $0 (waiting for payout)
Net: -$600

nodes.title: Month 3: First Payout (3 Accounts)
nodes.body:
3 × $1,400/month = $4,200
Running total: -$600 + $4,200 = +$3,600
Can now reinvest to scale

nodes.title: Months 4-5: Scale to 8 (2 accounts added)
nodes.body:
Need 5 more accounts × 2 attempts = 10 challenges
= $1,000 additional cost
3 accts still paying: 3 × $1,400 × 2mo = $8,400
Net YTD: $3,600 + $8,400 - $1,000 = +$11,000

nodes.title: Month 6+: All 8 Accounts Live
nodes.body:
8 × $1,400/month = $11,200/month
From here, recurring $11,200/mo
Year 1 total: $600 setup + (5mo × varying income) + (7mo × $11,200)

nodes.title: $3→8 Accounts Cost Breakdown
nodes.body:
Initial 3 accounts: 6 challenges = $600
Additional 5 accounts: 10 challenges = $1,000
Total cost to reach 8: $1,600

(At $100/50K challenge, 50% pass rate)
